about_intro: FinNews is a professional financial information platform built on the GoPress engine.
about_mission: We are committed to providing investors with timely, accurate, and in-depth financial information, covering:
about_feature_market: Market Updates — Stock, futures, and forex quotes
about_feature_analysis: In-Depth Analysis — Professional analyst team market insights
about_tech_intro: This site serves as a demo for the GoPress theme engine, showcasing its core capabilities:
about_tech_theme: Theme Switching — Switch via config, no code changes needed
about_tech_data: Data-Driven — All content types dynamically registered by themes
about_tech_admin: Adaptive Admin — Admin CMS auto-adapts to the current theme's content types
